title: pyrethrum coccineum
intro: Pyrethrum coccineum, also known as the scarlet pyrethrum, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and the Himalayas. The plant's flowers, leaves, and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of pyrethrum coccineum include reducing fever, relieving headaches and joint pain, and treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach ulcers. Pyrethrum coccineum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to make topical creams and salves for skin conditions and wounds.
